title: Logical Redstone Startup
description: A modpack for the beginner to logical redstone
body:
This mod pack contains mods and a useful resource pack to start with logical redstone

It also contains the [Open Redstone Engineers](https://openredstone.org/) server, wich is a redstone server where you can share your redstone build and learn from other player

Here is a [youtube playlist](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PL5LiOvrbVo8keeEWRZVaHfprU4zQTCsV4) where you can learn more about logical redstone
